title: Hotel Guest Complaint Handling Process
trigger: A guest submits a complaint through any channel (front desk, email, phone, OTA review).

steps.title: Acknowledge Receipt of Complaint
steps.action: Immediately acknowledge the receipt of the complaint to the guest, thanking them for their feedback. Ensure the guest feels heard and valued.

steps.title: Log Complaint in PMS
steps.action: Record the complaint details in the Property Management System (PMS) to ensure it is tracked and can be referenced in future interactions.

steps.title: Investigate Complaint
steps.action: Conduct a thorough investigation of the complaint by gathering information from relevant departments such as housekeeping, F&B, or maintenance.

steps.title: Resolve Valid Complaint
steps.action: Implement a solution to resolve the complaint, such as offering a room upgrade, complimentary service, or a discount. Communicate the resolution to the guest.

steps.title: Communicate Findings for Invalid Complaint
steps.action: Politely communicate the findings to the guest, explaining why the complaint is not valid. Offer a gesture of goodwill if appropriate.

steps.title: Escalate Unresolved Complaints
steps.action: If the complaint cannot be resolved at the current level, escalate it to the Hotel Manager or relevant department head for further action.

steps.title: Follow-Up with Guest
steps.action: After resolution, follow up with the guest to ensure satisfaction and reinforce the hotel's commitment to guest experience.

description: This playbook outlines the process for handling guest complaints in a hotel setting, ensuring timely and effective resolution to maintain high guest satisfaction.
escalation_path: Unresolved complaints escalate to the Hotel Manager.
